_readme: Render recipe (starcomb resolution: CLI > this file > GENERIC). Tracks the generic pipeline; pin a knob here only with a measured, dataset-specific reason.

notes.spcc: broadband RGB from a mono filter wheel — SPCC runs sensor-null on the composed stack (the generic default; grounding measured immaterial on the one chip with a database curve)
notes.solve: narrow 53-arcmin field at 0.68"/px (FOCALLEN 1150 mm): solve with the position hint + the cached index scales — solve_field.py --ra=270.6 --dec=-23.0 --radius-deg=10 --scales=4-9 (the derived set reaches scale 1; scales 1-3 are multi-GB index downloads; scale 4 carried the solution)
notes.OPEN_DEFECT: deep red emission missing behind the reflection layer over the Trifid core; surviving red bloaty/flattened at zoom (user, on the lossless finals). LOCALIZED by stage probes on the cached trio: the post-stretch 'denoise -vst -mod=0.5' crushes bright-object chroma — petal R-G +41.7 (stretch only) -> +25.1 after vst (core +19.1 -> +9.7, reflection B-G +17.3 -> +9.8; faint rim untouched +48.4 -> +47.1) — and blurs the surviving red into soft flat patches. Every other stage measured chroma-neutral in the core boxes: chroma_core 0/2/4 starless petal R-G 26.1/25.8/25.6 (identical), black_point x1.033, stars screen-combine +3 off-star, satu x1.2. Separation exonerated (starless keeps >=98.8% of nebula flux; stars-layer median 0.00 between stars). Upstream exonerated (our linear above-sky petal R/G 2.21, rim 3.10 vs the author's calibrated linear 1.95/2.26). Fix ladder run: starless_denoise off/gx vs vstpost control; DEFECT STAYS OPEN until the user approves a look from the lossless finals
notes.ladders: four single-knob ladders measured on this set: chroma_core 0/2/4 -> gate colour 5/4/3, small real-chroma gains, the blue reflection stays floor-bound (k is NOT its suppressor); cull_pct 0/25/50 -> NULL (identical metrics and panels); black_point 0/4/8 -> sky floor 15/11/7, gate slightly better at the lower floor, faint dust emerges; starless_denoise off/gx/vstpost -> off PASSES with the best gate numbers (colour 2.0/grad 1.4/blotch 0.9/rings 3.3) and restores the bright-object chroma the OPEN_DEFECT names (final petal R-G +50.1 vs vstpost +31.5, core +23.7 vs +12.7, reflection B-G +19.5 vs +10.8), gx KILLED (gate colour 11.0 FAIL, sky tint). Candidate chroma_core=2 + black_point=4 rendered lossless, gate PASS (colour 4.0, grad 1.1, blotch 0.9, rings 3.3). Pinning awaits the user's judgment vs control + the author's finish
